title: Blasticidin S HCl in Mammalian Culture Determine Working Concentration

steps: Plate 5x10^4 blasticidin sensitive host cells in 6-12 wells of a 24-well plate using appropriate media (without blasticidin) and incubate overnight. 24:00:00 Blasticidin S HCl P212121 Catalog #TE-B001
Replace media with fresh media containing 6-12 different concentrations (one for each well) of blasticidin S HCl. 72:00:00 Blasticidin S HCl P212121 Catalog #TE-B001
Continue replacing media with fresh blasticidin S HCl containing media every 3-4 days and monitor cells for normal activity. 72:00:00 Blasticidin S HCl P212121 Catalog #TE-B001

After 5-7 days, determine the lowest concentration of blasticidin S HCl containing media that killed 100% of blasticidin sensitive host cells. This is the optimal dose to use for your selection procedure. 144:00:00 Blasticidin S HCl P212121 Catalog #TE-B001
creator: Sean Seaver
